cards.text: 1MDB asset recovery has surpassed RM20.7 billion — a decade in, the headline number is now bigger than most people remember.
cards.sub: MOF figure as of October 2025. The Goldman Sachs 2020 settlement alone returned USD3.9 billion to Malaysia.
sources: BACKFILL: traced from currently-published cards. Pre-pipeline issue; primary sources to be added in research brief expansion.

cards.h: Goldman Sachs paid USD3.9 billion in 2020 — the largest single 1MDB-related recovery to date.
cards.s: The settlement included a USD2.5 billion cash payment plus a guarantee to help recover at least USD1.4 billion in misappropriated assets.
sources: BACKFILL: traced from currently-published cards. Pre-pipeline issue; primary sources to be added in research brief expansion.

cards.h: Recovery flows from settlements with financial institutions, asset seizures across multiple jurisdictions, and criminal prosecutions.
cards.s: The US Department of Justice has separately recovered and returned about USD1.4 billion in assets to Malaysia by mid-2024.
sources: BACKFILL: traced from currently-published cards. Pre-pipeline issue; primary sources to be added in research brief expansion.

cards.h: Total scandal losses remain disputed — figures cited range from USD4.5 billion (DOJ) up to RM30+ billion in broader Malaysian estimates.
cards.s: Recovery comparisons depend on which loss baseline is used. Multiple jurisdictions have ongoing litigation that may produce further recoveries.
sources: BACKFILL: traced from currently-published cards. Pre-pipeline issue; primary sources to be added in research brief expansion.

cards.text: The recovery story is no longer 'how little came back' — it is whether the recovered funds reach public accounts and reform follows.
sources: BACKFILL: traced from currently-published cards. Pre-pipeline issue; primary sources to be added in research brief expansion.

cards.text: RM20.7 billion is the largest financial-crime recovery in Malaysian history. The remaining test is whether the institutions that enabled the scandal have been structurally changed.
sources: BACKFILL: traced from currently-published cards. Pre-pipeline issue; primary sources to be added in research brief expansion.

issue_headline: 1MDB Asset Recovery Has Reached Over RM20.7 Billion
